case_title: YERI-OBIDAKE, FUNPERE vs. DAVIS, MICHAEL STANLEY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERI-OBIDAKE, FUNPERE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, MICHAEL STANLEY DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-24-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-25-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-06-1997
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-30-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-30-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON SEP-30-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-15-1997 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
LETTER DATED 10/8/97 FROM PLFF IN PRO PER

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-24-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SANCTIONS WILL BE VACATED IF DISMISSAL FILED 5 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. OSC TO PLTF IN PRO PER. HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER, FUNPERE YERI-OBIDAKE, TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF, FUNPERE YERI-OBIDAKE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE A NEW STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. IF DISMISSAL FILED SANCTIONS VACATED 20 DAYS BEFORE HRG DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-18-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-03-1997 TO FEB-04-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-04-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-04-1998, PLTF. TO FILE STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT 20 DAY BEFORE HEARING OSC TO PLTF FUNPERE YERI-OBIDAKE IN PRO PER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-15-1998 CONTINUED FROM FEB-04-1998 TO MAR-25-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
